item.title: Hands Free, AIs Forward: NVIDIA XR AI Brings Agents to AR Glasses
item.description: Focus: NVIDIA XR AI is now available in public beta, giving developers a framework for building multimodal AI agents for AR glasses and XR devices.

item.title: Coherent Breaks Ground on Expanded Texas Facility, Scaling AI’s Optical Backbone
item.description: Focus: AI runs at the speed of light. More and more, that light is made in Texas. Coherent broke ground today on an expanded manufacturing building in Sherman, Texas. The company makes the lasers, optical components and compound semiconductors that wire AI systems together — and runs what it calls t

item.title: HPE AI Factory With NVIDIA Expands for the Era of Agents
item.description: Focus: Enterprises are moving agentic AI from proof of concept to production — and the next generation of AI factories are built for the era of agents. At HPE Discover Las Vegas, running through Thursday, June 18, NVIDIA and HPE are expanding the HPE AI Factory with NVIDIA, including NVIDIA Vera CPU

item.title: Fastest, Largest, Strongest: NVIDIA Blackwell Sweeps MLPerf Training 6.0
item.description: Focus: Every breakthrough AI model starts the same way: with a training run. The infrastructure running those training jobs shapes everything: how fast teams can iterate, what scale of model they can build and whether those jobs complete reliably. As models grow in size, complexity and intelligence,

item.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
item.description: Focus: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.

item.title: Unlocking UK house-building with AI-accelerated planning
item.description: Focus: UK government partners with Google DeepMind to build a new AI-powered prototype aimed at faster housing decisions.

item.title: Ada Palmer – Machiavelli is the most misunderstood thinker of all time
item.description: Focus: "He begged to work for the regime that tortured him."

item.title: [AINews] Satya on Loopcraft: Building Frontier Ecosystems
item.description: Focus: a quiet day lets us report on Satya's hit essay

item.title: Vercel Sandbox can now run for up to 24 hours
item.description: Focus: Vercel Sandboxes can run uninterrupted sessions for up to 24 hours (up from 5 hours). This new max duration unlocks workloads that require longer runtimes, such as large-scale data processing, end-to-end testing pipelines, and long-lived agentic workflows. Pair with persistent sandboxes to ma

item.title: GLM 5.2 now available on AI Gateway
item.description: Focus: GLM 5.2 is now available on AI Gateway . Built for long-horizon tasks, GLM 5.2 carries project-level engineering context across a single task, runs long-running tasks more reliably, and follows engineering standards more consistently. The context window for this model has been upgraded to 1M

item.title: Workflow SDK now supports inflight cancellation
item.description: Focus: The Workflow SDK 5 beta now supports the standard AbortController and AbortSignal APIs across workflow and step boundaries. Create a controller inside a workflow, pass its signal into one or more steps, and cancel in-flight operations using the same API fetch already uses. That signal stays d

item.title: Workflow SDK now supports TanStack Start
item.description: Focus: Workflow SDK now supports TanStack Start applications on Vercel. TanStack Start is built on Vite and Nitro , so the existing workflow/vite plugin works directly. Add it to vite.config.ts alongside tanstackStart() . From there, write workflow and step functions in standard TypeScript with "use

item.title: Vercel Functions can now run up to 30 minutes
item.description: Focus: Vercel Functions using the Node.js and Python runtimes now support execution durations up to 30 minutes for Pro and Enterprise teams, more than 2x the previous 800 second limit. Support for additional runtimes is coming soon. Use longer-running Functions for work that needs more time to finis

item.title: Auth0 joins the Vercel Marketplace
item.description: Focus: You can now add Auth0 , a production-ready authentication to your Vercel app in just a few clicks. Built for modern frameworks like Next.js, Auth0 is an identity and access management platform for securing your apps and agentic workflows. This integration enables: Automatic provisioning of an

item.title: Increased Blob store limit for Hobby users
item.description: Focus: Hobby users can now create up to 100 Blob stores, up from 5. This gives teams more flexibility to organize data by project, environment, or region as applications grow. Storage, operations, and transfer limits still apply. Learn more in the Blob documentation .

item.title: Workflow SDK now runs natively in Nitro v3
item.description: Focus: Workflow SDK 's native Nitro v3 integration is now in beta. Steps run inside the same bundled runtime as the rest of your app, instead of a separate bundle. Nitro's useStorage() and other server-side APIs work directly inside "use step" functions. The Nitro dev server also serves the workflow

item.title: Extending Human Intelligence Through AI
item.description: Focus: Understanding AI as an extension of human intelligence—not a replacement for it—offers a more grounded path for building trustworthy AI systems. The post Extending Human Intelligence Through AI appeared first on Microsoft Research .

item.title: mimalloc: A new, high-performance, scalable memory allocator for the modern era
item.description: Focus: mimalloc is an open-source, modern, scalable memory allocator that is a drop-in replacement for malloc and free. It is relatively small (~12K lines), with clear internal data structures, and is easy to build and integrate into other projects. It provides bounded worst-case allocation times (u
